director.name: 瓦莱丽·玛萨迪昂 Valérie Massadian

introduction: An old thunderstorm rumbles in my head. A thunderstorm born 25 years ago. A storm at times distant, almost forgotten. A thunderstorm often deafening. Literature assured me men existed for a long time. Music taught me their melancholy preceded them. Painting whispered to me that screams can be silent. The trade of men, very fast, seemed to me vague and vain.https://letterboxd.com/film/solitudes-linsomnie/
